title: Explain This Code
description: Get a clear, layered explanation of an unfamiliar piece of code.
content:
Explain the following code:

```
{{code}}
```

Structure your answer as:
1. One sentence: what it does overall.
2. A step-by-step walk-through of the control flow.
3. Any non-obvious details — performance characteristics, side effects, edge cases, or subtle bugs.
4. What a caller needs to know to use it correctly.

Assume I'm a competent engineer new to this specific code.
